element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic melee combat against pirate henchmen
Enhanced combat capability; dropped on hit, requiring dagger fallback
Starts with 2 leaves, expandable to 4 maximum via collection
Scattered throughout levels for health refill
Enables temporary flight with depletable Fly Meter; Tinker Bell refills meter
Progressive enemy encounters across diverse environments

element_introduction_order.element: Environmental locations (caves, forests, lagoons, snowy mountains)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Theme-based level design with location-specific challenges
Concluding sword fight with primary antagonist

typical_relief_triggers: Safe environmental passages between combat zones
typical_tension_triggers: Health depletion risk (starting with only 2 leaves)
Weapon loss on hit (reverting to dagger)
Fly Meter depletion during platforming sections
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Combat-punctuated platforming with resource management tension; relief provided through consumable pickups and temporary power-ups

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces basic combat with dagger and simple enemy patterns; establishes health/leaf system with 2-leaf starting point
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Golden Sword acquisition after Level 1 increases player capability; pixie dust flight mechanic introduces vertical platforming; enemy variety and environmental complexity increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalating enemy encounters across diverse locations; culminates in Captain Hook boss fight requiring sword combat mastery
notable_spikes: Weapon loss mechanic creates tension whenever player takes damage
Limited health pool (2-4 leaves) maintains persistent vulnerability

notable_level_patterns.description: Dagger serves as foundation weapon; Golden Sword earned after Level 1 provides enhanced combat capability but is lost on hit, forcing fallback to dagger
11 levels distributed across diverse locations: caves, forests, lagoons, snowy mountains providing visual and thematic variation
Pixie dust acquisition enables temporary flight with Fly Meter; Tinker Bell provides refill points, creating puzzle-platformer moments
Starting with only 2 leaves maximum 4; fruit pickups scattered to manage health tension throughout levels
